campaign.recent_activity: Your recent activity on Twibbonize involved using words that violate our Terms of Use. Please avoid {words} to prevent account suspension.
campaign.campaign_unavailable_desc: This campaign is currently unavailable because its activity does not comply with our {terms}. Please check back later or explore other active campaigns.

profile.violate_terms: Twibbonize suspends accounts that violate our {terms}

appeal.days_left: {days} days left to appeal, or we’ll permanently disable your account.
appeal.what_this_means_detail: Your account is currently suspended and not visible to others on Twibbonize. You are unable to use the platform at this time.
appeal.what_you_can_do_details: You have {days} days to appeal this decision. We may need to collect additional information from you to assist in reviewing your account.
appeal.why_this_happened_details: We’ve noticed activity on {username} that doesn’t comply with our {terms}.
appeal.provide_information: Please be sure to provide the requested information below
appeal.regulatory_compilance: Due to regulatory compliance we need a bit more information regarding your valid ID issued. Failure to provide this information may delay the processing of your appeal.
appeal.explain_why: Please explain why you believe the content should not have been removed.
appeal.select_file: Select a file or drag and drop here
appeal.format_file: JPG, PNG or PDF, file size no more than 10MB
appeal.takes_a_day_review: It typically takes us just over a day to review your information. Check back here for updates.
appeal.not_visible: Your account is currently not visible to others on Twibbonize, and you are unable to use it.
appeal.complies_terms: If we find that your account complies with our {terms}, you'll regain access to Twibbonize.
appeal.not_comply: If we determine that your account still does not comply with our {terms}, your account will be permanently disabled, and you won’t be able to appeal again.
appeal.no_longed_suspended: Hi {username}, your account is no longer suspended.
appeal.thankyou_requesting_review: Thank you for requesting an account review. We’ve reviewed your account and confirmed that its activity complies with our {terms}, so you may now use Twibbonize again.
appeal.sorry_couldnt_access: We're sorry you couldn't access Twibbonize while your account was suspended. To ensure a safe environment for everyone, we occasionally need to take precautionary measures.
appeal.rejected_and_closed: Appeal rejected, and we’ve closed your account
appeal.through_review: After a thorough review of your case, we've decided to maintain the closure of your account.
appeal.does_not_comply: Your account, or its activity, does not comply with our {terms}.
appeal.review_non_compliance: The appeal review confirmed this non-compliance with our platform standards.
appeal.no_one_can_see: No one can see or find your account and you can't use it.
appeal.all_information_deleted: All your information will be permanently deleted.
appeal.cannot_request: You cannot  request another review of this decision.
appeal.permanently_suspend: We've decided to permanently suspend your account as no appeal was submitted within 180 days.

header.hero_body_1: You wore the jersey. You pinned the badge. You carried the banner. You stood in the crowd and everyone around you could see what you were part of.
header.hero_body_2: The internet made everything shareable but lost the most human part. The proud, public act of saying “{quote}” disappeared into feeds full of content nobody asked for. Sharing became transactional. Belonging became invisible.
header.hero_subheading: We wanted to bring it back.
header.hero_tagline: So we built a platform where people can show the world what they stand with, just by adding their photo.
header.hero_phone_alt: Twibbonize mobile campaign — Hanoi Art Book Fair

our_team.view_all: Tingnan ang lahat ng aming mga tauhan (at bawat isa sa kanilang mga kuwento)
our_team.subtitle: 13 people. Indonesia. Seven years and counting.
our_team.description: We've been building together since 2020. No one here joined because of a funding announcement or a TechCrunch feature. They joined because they thought this thing had a chance.

history.in_this: Sa digital na panahon na ito, ang social media ay naging pangunahing platform para sa isa upang ipahayag ang suporta, alalahanin, at iba pang mga damdamin
history.however: Gayunpaman, kung minsan ay nahihirapan tayo sa paghahanap ng mga tamang salita at kilos upang mabisang maihatid ang ating mga iniisip
history.visual_factor: Ang visual factor ay may malaking kapangyarihan sa kontekstong ito. Ang Twibbon ay isang simpleng solusyon para maging extension ng mga ideyang nais mong iparating

founder.name: Mulqan
founder.p1: I grew up in Aceh, Indonesia. If you know the name, it's probably because of the 2004 tsunami. I was nine. That's not the story of Twibbonize, but it's where I come from.
founder.p2: I started Twibbonize from a coffee shop in Aceh with no plan and no money. I was the only engineer for the first year. Now I lead a team of 13, but I still make most of the product decisions and I still answer support emails when things break at 2am.
founder.p3: I used to write every line of code. These days I think in systems and strategy. The thing that hasn't changed is the question I've been working on since 2019: how do you help people feel belonging at scale?

y2019.heading: A friend needed help with a campus event
y2019.p1: I was a university student trying to help my student council spread awareness on campus. We had messages worth sharing, but no good way to make students feel like they were actually part of them. Social media could broadcast a message. It couldn't make someone feel included.
y2019.p2: So I built a tool that let people add a frame to their photo. A visual way of saying: I'm with this.
y2019.p3: I wrote all the code at night, in a coffee shop in Aceh, because during the day I had classes and a part-time job. That job also funded the servers. Twibbonize made zero money. I paid for it because I wanted to.
y2019.p4: The tool worked. Students didn't just use it. They shared it. One student council passed it to another. One university to the next. It grew the way real things grow, through people who genuinely liked using it.
y2019.p5: For a while, it was mostly a campus thing. That was fine with me.

y2020.heading: Then COVID hit
y2020.p1: Government agencies started using Twibbonize to spread public health campaigns. Wear masks, get vaccinated, protect your family. Millions of people I'd never met, in cities I'd never been to, put these frames on their profiles.
y2020.p2: Not because anyone told them to. Because in a moment of collective uncertainty, people wanted a way to show each other: I'm doing my part too.
y2020.p3: That's when I realized this was bigger than what I'd built it for. From Indonesia it spread to the Philippines, Thailand, India, Brazil. The pattern was always the same. Someone starts a campaign around something they care about. Others join because it makes them feel seen and proud to participate. Then they share. And others follow.

y2021.heading: When the platform almost died, people showed up for it
y2021.p1: Here's something most people don't know about Twibbonize.
y2021.p2: I had no investors. No revenue. No business model. Just a growing server bill and a part-time salary. The growth that should have been exciting was actually terrifying, because every new user cost money I didn't have.
y2021.p3: So I did something uncomfortable. I asked people publicly to help fund the project.
y2021.p4: And they did. Not venture capitalists. Regular people. Students. Strangers who had used Twibbonize and wanted to see it survive. They gave what they could, not because they expected a return, but because they believed in what it was trying to do.
y2021.p5: In Indonesia, there's a word for this. {term}. It means people showing up together to carry what one person can't carry alone. When a neighbor builds a house, the community helps. Not for reward. Not out of obligation. Because that's what you do when you belong to each other.
y2021.quote: "I built a platform to help people show up for each other. And in its most fragile moment, people showed up for it."
y2021.p6: That moment changed what I believed a company could be. Everything since has been funded by the people who wanted Twibbonize to exist, first through donations, then through the communities and businesses that grew on the platform. To this day, we've raised zero dollars of venture capital.

whats_next.title: We grew up in Southeast Asia. The world showed up on its own.
whats_next.p1: We know what Twibbonize is in Indonesia. What surprised us is everywhere else.
whats_next.p2: 38 million people in the Philippines. Five million in Brazil. Kazakhstan outperforming most Western markets for reasons we still can’t explain. We didn’t expand into any of these places. We woke up and they were there.
whats_next.p3: In the UK, nearly half a million people use the platform already. Charities and advocacy groups come back every year to run campaigns that bring thousands together. That tells us something.
whats_next.p4: We’re following that signal now. Building tools for organizations to run campaigns at scale, with their own branding, analytics, and a supporter experience free of ads and watermarks.
whats_next.p5: There’s no company I can look at and say that’s where we’re headed. We’re building something that doesn’t have a playbook yet. But the thing that got me through seven years of building, the quiet satisfaction of watching people show up for each other, that hasn’t gone away. So we keep building.

banner_show_worth.title: Your people are already out there. Give them something worth sharing.
banner_show_worth.subtitle: Free to start. No credit card required.

editorial_picks.heading: Editorial Picks
editorial_picks.subheading: Campaigns making an impact around the world
editorial_picks.campaign_1_description: Down Syndrome UK started so no family faces a diagnosis alone. This World Down Syndrome Day, thousands showed up on Twibbonize, one profile picture at a time.
editorial_picks.campaign_2_description: The Philippine Commission on Women gave Filipinos a way to wear the Babaylan spirit proudly. 12,000+ Instagram posts later, #WEcanbeEquALL became a movement.
editorial_picks.campaign_3_description: The Ehlers-Danlos Society has spent a decade refusing to let EDS and HSD stay invisible. 11,000+ people have showed up on Twibbonize to carry that fight forward.
editorial_picks.campaign_4_description: In Kerala, an election is a conversation millions have at once. INC Kerala gave 4,300+ supporters a way to wear their conviction on every feed before April 9.

how_it_works.heading: How it works
how_it_works.step_1_description: Upload a frame, card, or story design
how_it_works.step_2_description: Post it, send it, embed it anywhere
how_it_works.step_3_description: Supporters add their photo and get a branded image
how_it_works.step_4_description: They post it. Their friends join. The cycle continues

carousel.grow_detail: Makakuha ng higit pang suporta gamit ang isang kampanya ng Twibbonize: hindi lamang ito nakakakuha ng atensyon ngunit lumilikha din ng bandwagon effect, na umaakit sa dumaraming audience na ayaw makaligtaan ang iyong layunin.

header.never_doubt: Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, visionary young adults can change the world and became a campaign revolution history maker!

team.our_philosophy: We're just a bunch of random people who happen to enjoy making good software.

advisor.proud_partner: We're proud to partner with people who are deeply aligned with our mission

about.mulqan_bio_1: Having a background in Information Technology doesn’t stop Mulqan from being someone who is also passionate about business for the greater good of everyone. His strong will and problem-solving nature always make him known as someone with great vision, which is always reflected in his work.
about.mulqan_bio_2: Mulqan started Twibbonize to help his friends massively generate Twibbon for an event on their campus. After getting recognition, Mulqan continued developing Twibbonize himself, before Fokkerizky finally reached out to him and brought Bernino all along. Starting as the CEO of Twibbonize, Mulqan now focuses on marketing Twibbonize with his fresh and creative ideas.
about.aditya_bio_1: Aditya Pradana was the first team member to join Twibbonize after the Board of Directors, and he has been instrumental in developing the company's front end. His high level of skill and meticulous attention to detail have made him a senior expert in the field, earning him the deep appreciation of Twibbonize.
about.aditya_bio_2: Aditya's laid-back and humorous personality makes him enjoyable to work with, yet he maintains a high degree of professionalism. Despite being the only frontend developer at Twibbonize, he consistently delivers projects quickly and effectively, demonstrating a level of dedication that sets him apart.
about.farhan_bio_1: Farhan was one of the first team members to join Twibbonize, alongside Aditya, after the Board of Directors. Despite always working remotely, he has maintained an impressive level of performance. His sharp analytical skills make him a key problem solver, a role he shares with Bernino.
about.farhan_bio_2: Farhan's cleverness and reliability are essential to the team, earning him the reputation of being the go-to person for resolving technical disputes. His consistent contributions and problem-solving expertise are deeply valued at Twibbonize, demonstrating that remote work doesn't hinder his ability to deliver results.
about.dominick_bio_1: Dominick is one of the most versatile team members at Twibbonize. She started as a Customer Excellence Officer, then moved to Human Resources after just six months. After a year in HR, she led the content marketing team. Lately, she’s been helping the Board of Directors with general affairs and business development works.
about.dominick_bio_2: Dominick graduated from Universitas Indonesia with a degree in English Studies. Despite her writing background, she excels in any role she's given. Her versatility and passion for her work make her a key asset to the team.
about.mahardika_bio_1: Mahardika's strength lies in his creativity and unique sense of style. He consistently brings innovative ideas that go beyond the conventional. His passion for both technology and art makes him a standout designer. Mahardika graduated with a degree in Fine Art from a private university in Bandung, Indonesia, and he's been deeply involved in the art world ever since.
about.mahardika_bio_2: Currently, Mahardika is responsible for the visual branding at Twibbonize. His distinct personality and design approach add vibrant character to Twibbonize's identity as a company and as a brand.
about.helena_bio_1: Helena has been responsible for Quality Assurance at Twibbonize since she joined the company. Her meticulous attention to detail, practical approach, and organizational skills have allowed her to excel in this role from the start.
about.helena_bio_2: Despite working remotely, Helena quickly identifies and resolves issues that impact user experience, often addressing them before others are even aware of the problem. Her professionalism and highly analytical mindset enable her to work with precision. Helena's proactive and reliable approach in general makes her an invaluable asset to the team.
about.zikri_bio_1: Zikri has always been passionate about the tech industry. During his university years, he actively took on lab assistant roles, gaining valuable insights and knowledge from his mentors. Zikri is a close friend of Mulqan and has been involved with Twibbonize from the very beginning, even before it became an established company.
about.zikri_bio_2: After completing his studies, Zikri joined Twibbonize at Mulqan's recommendation, initially serving as a backend engineer. He’s now working closely with Bernino and assist him in works that are related with analyzing and projecting outcomes for the Development Team's projects.
about.farizky_bio_1: Farizky is responsible for the entire UX design process at Twibbonize. His passion for UX design runs deep—before joining the company. At Twibbonize, he is involved in every stage of product development, from concept to final implementation.
about.farizky_bio_2: As a native of Yogyakarta, Indonesia, a city renowned for its artistic heritage, Farizky has always remained dedicated to his love for design and mentoring. Outside of work, he often participates in UX design communities, where he mentors younger designers. His interests range from creating interactive designs to auditing systems through coding, reflecting his broad expertise in the field.
about.yoga_bio_1: Yoga is actually an exceptional fullstack developer in practice. He's a close friend of Mulqan from their university days, alongside Zikri, which gave him early insight into Twibbonize, even before it became a company.
about.yoga_bio_2: Like Zikri, Yoga joined Twibbonize on Mulqan's recommendation. Initially a junior Product Developer, he quickly stood out for his coding ability and deep understanding of product development. Yoga's disciplined work ethic shows in the flawless results he consistently delivers. His commitment to excellence has made him a key contributor to Twibbonize's success.
about.safira_bio_1: Safira joined Twibbonize immediately after graduating with a degree in Accounting, securing a position on the Finance team. Despite her limited experience, she quickly displayed a strong understanding of general office operations, leading to her promotion to oversee HR and General Affairs in addition to her finance role.
about.safira_bio_2: Safira's versatility and attention to detail make her a key asset to the team. Her organized approach and professionalism ensure that Twibbonize's day-to-day operations run smoothly. With her ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently, she contributes significantly to the company's success.
about.yoko_bio_1: Like Andar, Yoko didn't start his career in the tech industry. He graduated with a degree in Hospitality from a private university in Jakarta, Indonesia, and initially built his career in the hospitality sector, working at five-star hotels in Jakarta. However, after several years, he decided to follow his passion and pivoted to the tech industry.
about.yoko_bio_2: Yoko took formal coding courses to transition into tech, then gained experience at several tech companies before joining Twibbonize. His quick wit and sharp intellect make him enjoyable to work with, adding a wonderful delight to the team.
about.chandra_bio_1: Chandra recently joined Twibbonize, following in the footsteps of Fahmi, who is also a university acquaintance of Bernino. He was brought on board to help Fahmi manage an increased workload.
about.chandra_bio_2: Although Chandra has only been with the team for a short time, he has already demonstrated remarkable excellence. He is highly focused at work and proactively participates in team discussions, contributing valuable insights. Chandra's prior experience in a similar role as a Mobile Developer has given him a solid foundation, making him a valuable addition to the team despite his relatively young age.
about.harry_bio_1: Harry Sugama is a co-founder and advisor at Twibbonize, where he provides strategic guidance. He also advises The Asia Group on business development and international partnerships. Previously, he managed financial operations and strategic planning as Finance and Accounting Manager at Blue Waves Group Ventures.
about.harry_bio_2: Harry holds a degree in Accounting from Padjadjaran University and furthered his studies at Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München. With expertise in finance, business strategy, and cross-cultural communication, he is known for his analytical skills and has been key to the growth of the companies he advises, especially Twibbonize.
about.andar_bio_1: Andar played a crucial role on the team at Twibbonize. Though he entered the company as a Product Manager without prior experience in the field, his background in Marketing and Sales provided him with valuable insights into customer needs and market trends.
about.andar_bio_2: Despite his limited experience in product management, Andar's commitment to learning and personal growth has been remarkable. He actively seeks out additional courses and training to expand his skill set, demonstrating a strong drive to improve. This proactive approach has allowed him to quickly excel as a Product Manager.
about.adam_bio_1: Adam is a dedicated and brilliant university sophomore who balances academic commitments with what can only be characterized as a natural talent for coding. He is a junior to Bernino, Fahmi, and Chandra at university, but his sincerity and work ethic have made him an impressive team member.
about.adam_bio_2: Despite being a university student with a hectic schedule, Adam consistently produces excellent work and displays the talents and professionalism that can match our experienced engineers. Even before graduating, his dedication to excellence marked him as a promising young talent in the industry.

modal.account_upgraded: Ang iyong account ay na-upgrade sa

faq.pricing_question_1: What is included in the free version of Twibbonize?
faq.pricing_answer_1:
The free version of Twibbonize includes essential features for creating, supporting, and sharing campaigns. However, there are a few limitations:

  • Twibbon results will include a watermark
  • Ads will be shown to you
  • Campaign Analytics and advanced customization options are not available for you
faq.pricing_question_2: I’m a Premium user, but my campaign still includes a watermark. How does this happen?
faq.pricing_answer_2:
With a Premium Supporter subscription, you can support any campaigns and generate twibbon photos without a watermark.

However, if you create a campaign, it will still include a watermark for others who participate in it.

This means Premium Supporter allows you to access and generate watermark-free Twibbons for your own use, but it does not remove the watermark for others generating Twibbons from your campaigns.

Additionally, please ensure you are logged into the Twibbonize account with the Premium Supporter subscription to enjoy this benefit.
faq.pricing_question_3: What’s the difference between Premium Supporter and Premium Creator?
faq.pricing_answer_3:
If you just want to create twibbon images without a watermark for yourself, Premium Supporter is the plan for you.

However, if you’re running a campaign and want everyone who participates to generate twibbon images without a watermark, then Premium Creator is the right choice.
faq.pricing_question_4: I’ve been subscribed to Twibbonize Premium prior to the change on November 5th, 2024. What will happen to my subscription?
faq.pricing_answer_4:
If you’re subscribed to Twibbonize Premium, your plan will be converted to Premium Supporter.

If you have any add-ons, your plan will instead be converted to Premium Creator.

For more detailed information or any special cases, please refer to the Premium Subscription Conversion article here.
faq.pricing_question_5: Can I ask for a refund?
faq.pricing_answer_5:
Refunds are generally not available. However, if you need assistance or encounter any issues, please feel free to reach out to us via Contact Us.

We will try our best to help you and provide assistance.
faq.pricing_question_6: Can I remove ads on my campaign’s page for everyone?
faq.pricing_answer_6:
Unfortunately, no; ads are only removed for Twibbonize Premium users. It works similarly to YouTube® Premium, where ads are only removed for premium users.

YouTube® is a registered trademark of Google LLC.
faq.pricing_question_7: What kind of information do I get in Campaign Analytics?
faq.pricing_answer_7:
Campaign Analytics provides you with valuable data about your campaign's performance, including:

  • Total number of campaign supporters
  • Total number of campaign visitors
  • Breakdown of campaign visitors by country and city

Please note that this data will be removed if you no longer subscribe to Premium Creator.
faq.pricing_question_8: Can I see everyone who supported my campaign in Campaign Analytics?
faq.pricing_answer_8:
Yes, you can view the total number of your campaign supporters in Campaign Analytics.

However, if you want to see the profiles of the supporters, you can only view those who have posted their Twibbon photos to the supporter gallery in your campaign.
faq.pricing_question_9: What can I customize in the campaign?
faq.pricing_answer_9: You can customize the background of your campaign page by using our exclusive backgrounds or uploading your own image.
faq.pricing_answer_10: A private campaign allows you to set your campaign so that only people with the link can view it, and/or only those with the campaign password can access it.
faq.pricing_answer_11: You can choose between credit or debit cards, processed through Stripe as our payment gateway.
faq.pricing_question_12: Where can I find help related to general Twibbonize usage?
faq.pricing_answer_12: You can visit our Help Center to find helpful articles for guidance or reach out to us through the Contact Us page.
faq.pricing_answer_11_id: You can choose between bank transfer, QRIS, credit card, or e-wallet.

header.twibbon_result: Ang Twibbon ay resulta ng pag-overlay ng template ng frame sa isang larawan, karaniwang ginagamit sa mga larawan sa profile o mga post sa social media upang ipahayag ang suporta para sa isang layunin, kampanya, o kaganapan

generate.a_frame: Isang Frame na ginawa ng isang tao

process.sharing_twibbon_1: Ang pagbabahagi ng Twibbon ay dating isang masalimuot na proseso kahit na kami ay

frame.twibbon_frame: Sa Twibbonize, ang Twibbon ay higit pa sa mga frame
frame.we_define: Tinukoy namin ang Twibbon bilang isang malakas na visual na template na nagiging extension ng iyong layunin, maging sa anyo ng isang frame o isang background

steps.now_everyone: Ngayon ang lahat ay maaaring tamasahin ang isang Twibbon, walang mga kasanayan sa disenyo o ilang kaalaman nang maaga
steps.design_twibbon: Magdisenyo ng Twibbon template sa Twibbonize Editor, o i-upload ang iyong .PNG na disenyo
steps.post_your_design: I-post ang iyong disenyo sa isang kampanya sa Twibbonize
steps.share_twibbon: Ibahagi ang Twibbon sa social media

cta.no_matter: Anuman ang gusto mong gawin, mula sa mga paggalaw na tumutugon sa malalaking, seryosong dahilan—hanggang sa anumang bagay para lamang sa kasiyahan. Matutulungan ka naming gawing isang bagay na malaki

header.ideas: Mga ideya kung saan gagamitin ang Twibbonize
header.jumpstart: Jumpstart your exploration with hand-picked examples from our 5,000,000+ Twibbonize campaigns

confirm.delete_lead: Sigurado ka bang gusto mong tanggalin ang post na ito? Ang gawaing ito ay hindi pwedeng baguhin.

intro_darkmode.darkmode_description: Twibbonize is now available in dark mode! Try our new easy-on-the-eyes interface for you night owls out there.

social.paragraph_8: Para sa mga layuning panlipunan na nangangailangan ng aksyon, tulad ng Women's March, ang Twibbonize ay nagbibigay ng nakikitang nakakahimok na plataporma para sa mga tagapagtaguyod na magkaisa. Ang paglikha ng isang nakatuong Twibbon ay nagbibigay-daan sa mga kalahok na ipakita ang kanilang pakikilahok sa nagbibigay-kapangyarihang kilusang ito nang buong pagmamalaki. Ang makapangyarihang tool na ito ay nagiging simbolo ng sama-samang pakikilahok, na nagpapatibay ng pakiramdam ng komunidad at pag-asa habang ang mga indibidwal ay buong pagmamalaki na nagpapakita ng kanilang koneksyon sa paparating na pagtitipon o pagkilos. Binabago ng Twibbonize ang online na suporta sa isang dinamikong puwersa para sa pagbabago, na nakikitang kumukonekta sa mga aktibista at tagasuporta sa buong mundo.
social.caption_9: Ang Twibbonize ay nagbibigay ng isang plataporma para sa mga organisasyon at kanilang mga miyembro upang ipahayag ang kanilang sariling katangian at gunitain ang mga makabuluhang milestone.
social.paragraph_10: Kapag nagdiriwang o ginugunita ang mahahalagang kaganapan, tulad ng Pride Month, nagiging digital canvas ang Twibbonize para sa pagpapahayag ng pagkakaisa at pagpapahalaga. Tingnan ang Pride Month campaign na ito mula sa TaskUs. Sa pamamagitan ng paggamit ng isang may temang Twibbon, makikita ng mga indibidwal, at organisasyon ang okasyon, na nag-aambag sa isang sama-samang pagdiriwang online. Nagiging simbolo ng pagkakaisa ang shared Twibbon, na nagbibigay-daan sa mga kalahok na ipakita ang kanilang natatanging mga sarili at ang kanilang pangako sa paggalang sa kanilang kasaysayan sa pakikipaglaban para sa pagkakapantay-pantay, pati na rin ang pagpapabuti ng pakiramdam ng pagiging kabilang sa loob ng komunidad. Binabago ng Twibbonize ang mga digital na espasyo sa mga makulay na sentro ng pagdiriwang at pag-alaala.
social.paragraph_11: Habang tinatanggap natin ang kapasidad ng digital era para sa pagkakakonekta, hayaan ang Twibbonize na patuloy na ipinta ang ating mga screen ng mga simbolo ng pagkakaisa, na lumilikha ng pangmatagalang epekto sa larangan ng social advocacy. Sama-sama, hinabi namin ang isang biswal na salaysay na lumalampas sa mga hangganan, na umaalingawngaw sa aming ibinahaging pangako sa isang mas mahabagin at nagkakaisang mundo.
